ddls:
CREATE TABLE "tracks" (
  "track_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each track */,
  "track_name" TEXT /* Name of the track */,
  "uri" TEXT /* URI of the track */,
  "acousticness" REAL /* Acousticness measure of the track */,
  "danceability" REAL /* Danceability measure of the track */,
  "energy" REAL /* Energy measure of the track */,
  "instrumentalness" REAL /* Instrumentalness measure of the track */,
  "liveness" REAL /* Liveness measure of the track */,
  "loudness" REAL /* Loudness measure of the track */,
  "speechiness" REAL /* Speechiness measure of the track */,
  "tempo" REAL /* Tempo of the track */,
  "valence" REAL /* Valence measure of the track */,
  "popularity" INTEGER /* Popularity measure of the track */,
  "album_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the album containing the track */,
  "artist_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the artist of the track */,
  "genre" TEXT /* Genre of the track */,
  "duration_ms" INTEGER /* Duration of the track in milliseconds */,
  "explicit" INTEGER /* Indicates if the track contains explicit content */,
  "lyrics" TEXT /* Lyrics of the track (if available) */,
  "album_release_date" TEXT /* Release date of the album */,
  "track_number" INTEGER /* Track number within the album */,
  "isrc" TEXT /* International Standard Recording Code (ISRC) of the track */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("track_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_tracks_artist_id FOREIGN KEY ("artist_id") REFERENCES artists ("artist_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_tracks_album_id FOREIGN KEY ("album_id") REFERENCES albums ("album_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "albums" (
  "album_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each album */,
  "album_name" TEXT /* Name of the album */,
  "artist_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the artist who created the album */,
  "release_date" TEXT /* Release date of the album */,
  "total_tracks" INTEGER /* Total number of tracks in the album */,
  "cover_art_url" TEXT /* URL of the album cover art */,
  "genre" TEXT /* Genre of the album */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("album_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_albums_artist_id FOREIGN KEY ("artist_id") REFERENCES artists ("artist_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "artists" (
  "artist_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each artist */,
  "artist_name" TEXT /* Name of the artist */,
  "genre" TEXT /* Primary genre of the artist */,
  "biography" TEXT /* Brief biography of the artist */,
  "profile_picture_url" TEXT /* URL of the artist's profile picture */,
  "social_media_links" TEXT /* Links to the artist's social media profiles */,
  "popularity" INTEGER /* Popularity measure of the artist */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("artist_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed password for user authentication */,
  "date_of_birth" TEXT /* Date of birth of the user */,
  "gender" TEXT /* Gender of the user */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the user */,
  "account_creation_date" TEXT /* Date when the user's account was created */,
  "account_type" TEXT /* Type of user account (e.g., free, premium) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_preferences" (
  "preference_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user preference */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user */,
  "genre" TEXT /* Preferred genre of music */,
  "artist" TEXT /* Preferred artist */,
  "track" TEXT /* Preferred track */,
  "mood" TEXT /* Preferred mood */,
  "tempo_range" TEXT /* Preferred tempo range */,
  "energy_range" TEXT /* Preferred energy range */,
  "acousticness_range" TEXT /* Preferred acousticness range */,
  "valence_range" TEXT /* Preferred valence range */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("preference_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_preferences_track FOREIGN KEY ("track") REFERENCES tracks ("track_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_preferences_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "listening_history" (
  "history_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each listening event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user */,
  "track_id" INTEGER /* ID of the track listened to */,
  "listen_date" TEXT /* Date when the track was listened to */,
  "listen_count" INTEGER /* Number of times the track was listened to */,
  "device_type" TEXT /* Type of device used for listening */,
  "listening_duration" INTEGER /* Total duration of the listening session */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location where the user listened to the track */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("history_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_listening_history_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_listening_history_track_id FOREIGN KEY ("track_id") REFERENCES tracks ("track_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "recommendations" (
  "recommendation_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each recommendation */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user */,
  "track_id" INTEGER /* ID of the recommended track */,
  "recommendation_date" TEXT /* Date when the recommendation was made */,
  "score" REAL /* Score indicating the strength of the recommendation */,
  "algorithm_used" TEXT /* Name of the algorithm used to generate the recommendation */,
  "reason" TEXT /* Reason for the recommendation */,
  "user_feedback" TEXT /* User's feedback on the recommendation */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("recommendation_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_recommendations_track_id FOREIGN KEY ("track_id") REFERENCES tracks ("track_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_recommendations_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
